provisions.title: Title
provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Public Health (Notification of COVID – 19) Order, 2020.

provisions.title: Notifiable disease
provisions.content: COVID – 19 is declared to be a notifiable disease for the purposes of the Public Health Act.

provisions.title: Application of act
provisions.content: Section 11 (Power to make Rules), Part IV (Prevention and Suppression of Infectious Diseases) and section 36 (Power to Enforce Precautions at Boarders) of the Public Health Act shall apply to COVID – 19.

provisions.title: Duration of order
provisions.content: This Order shall expire on notification by the Minister. History of this document 17 March 2020 this version Published in Government Gazette 17 Commenced Related documents [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Facebook Page Visit our Twitter/X profile About ULII ULII is a project of the Law Reporting Committee of the Judiciary of Uganda. ULII aims to bridge the existing gap in public access to the law of Uganda. Working with the AfricanLII and in collaboration with other partners, such as the Free Access to Law Movement, ULII's major aim is to be a user-friendly portal of all publicly available legal information in Uganda. The Judiciary of Uganda considers access to its decisions and the law upon which they are based as key tenets of its key mission: Justice for All . ULII is also an end user interface for the Electronic Court Case Management Information System.
